projectDescription: A documentation platform that lets teams build, deploy, and maintain beautiful, developer-friendly documentation sites from MDX files.
keyFeatures: MDX-based documentation pages with rich component support
Local preview with hot reload via Mintlify CLI
Built-in API reference documentation from OpenAPI specs
AI-assisted writing with Cursor, Claude Code, and Windsurf
Customizable branding — colors, logo, favicon, navigation
Contextual AI chat (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) on every page
publicApiSurface: mint dev — start local preview server
mint dev --port <port> — run on custom port
mint update — update CLI to latest version
npx skills add <url> — install AI writing skill
docs.json: name, colors, logo, favicon, navigation, navbar, footer, openapi, contextual
